title: Stay a Little
tags: whisper pop, lofi r&b, soft vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Stay a Little
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

[Verse 1]
Stay a little, turn the page
There is no race inside this room
Let the quiet set the pace
Let the lamp become the moon

[Hook]
I am here, keep going
Soft and slow, keep going
One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Verse 2]
Tabs are open, tea is warm
Rain is tapping out the time
If the thought comes out half formed
We can shape it line by line

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
Nothing has to shine too loud
Breathe in, breathe out
Little steps are still allowed

[Final Hook]
I am here, keep going
Soft and slow, keep going
One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Outro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

title: One More Tab
tags: soft pop, city pop lite, tiny hook, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: One More Tab
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
One more tab, one more line

[Verse 1]
The window glows in violet blue
A little task is passing through
No need to win the whole night now
Just find the next good sentence somehow

[Hook]
One more tab, one more line
Tiny spark, borrowed time
One more tab, one more line
We are doing fine

[Verse 2]
The kettle clicks, the cursor waits
A small idea unlocks the gate
If it is messy, let it be
The first draft only has to breathe

[Bridge]
Save the page
Stretch your hands
Come back light
Make no grand demands

[Final Hook]
One more tab, one more line
Tiny spark, borrowed time
One more tab, one more line
We are doing fine

[Outro]
One more tab
One more line

title: Same Room
tags: roommate r&b, neo soul, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Same Room
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Same room, quiet radio

[Verse 1]
No rush, we can take it slow
Same room, quiet radio
Coffee steam and a steady glow
One more line and then we know

[Hook]
No rush tonight
We keep the little light
No rush tonight
You write, I stay nearby

[Verse 2]
Half the plan is on the floor
Half is knocking at the door
We can leave the heavy part
For tomorrow's stronger heart

[Bridge]
If the minute slips away
Let it go, let it go
We can find another way
Soft and low, soft and low

[Final Hook]
No rush tonight
We keep the little light
No rush tonight
You write, I stay nearby

[Outro]
Same room, quiet radio

title: Softly On
tags: whisper pop, ambient r&b, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Softly On
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Softly on, softly on

[Verse 1]
The night is not asking for more than a start
A sentence, a sketch, a small open heart
The room hums low like it knows what to do
I will keep the soft signal for you

[Hook]
Softly on, softly on
Nothing here has to be strong
Softly on, softly on
Stay with me and move along

[Verse 2]
The page is patient, the clock is kind
The better word can take its time
If you get lost in the quiet part
Follow the glow from the little star

[Bridge]
Rest your eyes for a breath
Leave the hard thought on the shelf
Come back when the feeling clears
I will still be here

[Final Hook]
Softly on, softly on
Nothing here has to be strong
Softly on, softly on
Stay with me and move along

[Outro]
Softly on

title: 小灯还亮着
tags: 中文轻唱, lofi pop, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese

submitted.title: 小灯还亮着
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
小灯还亮着
别急着关掉

[主歌一]
桌上的纸还没有写完
杯里的茶慢慢变淡
今天不用变得多勇敢
先把这一页轻轻看完

[副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[主歌二]
窗外的雨把夜色放软
光标停在安静一端

你把今天摊开

不要追太快

title: 灯りのそばで
tags: Japanese soft pop, lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese

submitted.title: 灯りのそばで
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
灯りのそばで
ゆっくり始めよう

[Verse 1]
ページの上に 小さな夜
鉛筆の音 そっと踊る
急がなくていい ここにいるよ
君のペースで 進めばいい

[Hook]
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
一行ずつでいい
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
灯りは消えない

[Verse 2]
窓の向こうで 雨が歌う
迷った言葉も 眠らせよう
また戻ればいい ここにいるよ
小さな夢を ほどいていこう

[Bridge]
深呼吸して
肩の力を抜いて
静かな夜に
名前をつけよう

[Final Hook]
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
一行ずつでいい
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
灯りは消えない

[Outro]
灯りのそばで
ゆっくり続けよう

title: もう少しだけ
tags: Japanese bedroom pop, soft r&b, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese

submitted.title: もう少しだけ
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
もう少しだけ

[Verse 1]
机の上に 夜が来て
カップの影が 揺れている
答えはまだ 遠くても
今日の君は ここにいる

[Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Verse 2]
消した言葉も 道になる
ため息さえも リズムになる
眠い星が まばたきして
次の一歩を 教えてる

[Bridge]
止まってもいい
戻ってもいい
静かな声で
また始めよう

[Final Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Outro]
もう少しだけ

title: 窓辺のリズム
tags: Japanese city pop lite, soft groove, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese

submitted.title: 窓辺のリズム
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
窓辺のリズム

[Verse 1]
青い画面に 朝が来る
少し眠たい コードの海
忘れたメモを 探しながら
軽いステップで 進んでいく

[Hook]
窓辺のリズムで
今日をほどいて
小さなビートで
手を動かして

[Verse 2]
予定通りじゃ なくてもいい
回り道にも 名前がある
コーヒーの香り 浮かんだら
新しい線を 引いてみよう

[Bridge]
ゆらり ゆらり
焦らないで
ひかり ひかり
ここにあるよ

[Final Hook]
窓辺のリズムで
今日をほどいて
小さなビートで
手を動かして

[Outro]
窓辺のリズム

title: 작은 불빛
tags: Korean soft r&b, lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 작은 불빛
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
작은 불빛 옆에
천천히 앉아

[Verse 1]
책상 위에 밤이 내려와
조용한 숨처럼 머물러
급하지 않아도 괜찮아
한 줄씩 마음을 열어봐

[Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Verse 2]
커피 향이 살짝 식어도
생각은 다시 따뜻해져
흐린 문장도 길이 되고
손끝에 리듬이 돌아와

[Bridge]
숨을 쉬어
어깨를 내려놔
작은 밤이
너를 안아줄 거야

[Final Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Outro]
작은 불빛 옆에

title: 한 줄 더
tags: Korean bedroom pop, soft beat, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 한 줄 더
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
한 줄 더

[Verse 1]
창문 밖은 조용해지고
화면 속엔 작은 별 하나
완벽하지 않아도 좋아
지금은 시작이면 돼

[Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Verse 2]
지워진 말도 남아 있어
다른 길을 알려주니까
손끝에서 빛이 나면
오늘도 조금 가까워져

[Bridge]
쉬어도 돼
다시 와도 돼
여기 음악은
계속 기다려

[Final Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Outro]
한 줄 더

title: Luz de Mesa
tags: Spanish soft pop, bossa lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Spanish

submitted.title: Luz de Mesa
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Luz de mesa, voz pequeña

[Verse 1]
La noche cae sin prisa aquí
Tu cuaderno vuelve a respirar
No hay montaña que subir
Solo una línea para empezar

[Hook]
Sigue despacio, estoy aquí
Paso pequeño, sigue así
Sigue despacio, no hay final
La luz aprende a acompañar

[Verse 2]
La lluvia toca el ventanal
Como un compás de claridad
Si una palabra sale mal
La dejamos descansar

[Bridge]
Respira un poco
Suelta el ruido
Vuelve suave
Al mismo sitio

[Final Hook]
Sigue despacio, estoy aquí
Paso pequeño, sigue así
Sigue despacio, no hay final
La luz aprende a acompañar

[Outro]
Luz de mesa, voz pequeña

title: Un Poco Más
tags: Spanish indie pop, soft r&b, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Spanish

submitted.title: Un Poco Más
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Un poco más

[Verse 1]
El cursor parpadea sin hablar
La taza se enfría junto al plan
No tienes todo que arreglar
Solo volver a comenzar

[Hook]
Un poco más, un poco más
La noche nos puede esperar
Un poco más, sin correr
Lo pequeño también va a crecer

[Verse 2]
Hay notas sueltas en la pared
Y una idea tímida al volver
Si el mundo pesa sobre ti
Yo bajo el volumen para seguir

[Bridge]
Manos quietas
Luz abierta
Respira lento
La puerta está cerca

[Final Hook]
Un poco más, un poco más
La noche nos puede esperar
Un poco más, sin correr
Lo pequeño también va a crecer

[Outro]
Un poco más

title: Petite Lumière
tags: French soft pop, lofi chanson, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French

submitted.title: Petite Lumière
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Petite lumière
Reste près de moi

[Verse 1]
La page attend sans faire de bruit
Le soir s'installe au bord du thé
Tu n'as pas besoin d'aller vite
Un mot suffit pour commencer

[Hook]
Doucement, je reste là
Petite lumière, guide nos pas
Doucement, on continuera
Même si la phrase hésite parfois

[Verse 2]
La pluie dessine sur la vitre
Un vieux refrain très familier
Si ton idée devient timide
Laisse-la revenir respirer

[Bridge]
Ferme les yeux
Le monde peut attendre
Rouvre les mains
Le calme va descendre

[Final Hook]
Doucement, je reste là
Petite lumière, guide nos pas
Doucement, on continuera
Même si la phrase hésite parfois

[Outro]
Petite lumière
Reste près de moi

title: Encore Une Ligne
tags: French bedroom pop, soft groove, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French

submitted.title: Encore Une Ligne
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Encore une ligne

[Verse 1]
Le clavier chante doucement
La ville dort à moitié seulement
On garde un peu de courage
Dans le coin clair de la page

[Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Verse 2]
Même les idées sans couleur
Peuvent revenir avec douceur
Si la route tourne un peu
On suivra le fil lumineux

[Bridge]
Laisse le doute
Sur la table
Reviens léger
Reviens capable

[Final Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Outro]
Encore une ligne

title: Room Radio
tags: soft global pop, lofi r&b, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, English + Chinese

submitted.title: Room Radio
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Room radio
小小电台

[Verse 1]
Keep the light low, keep the page near
No need to hurry, I am right here
窗外的风慢慢吹来
把乱掉的心轻轻打开

[Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Verse 2]
The tiny clock is not a judge
A quiet start can be enough
桌上的梦还没醒来
我们就先陪它等待

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
别急着回答
Breathe in, breathe out
小光也会长大

[Final Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Outro]
Room radio
小小电台

title: Daijoubu Little Star
tags: soft pop, Japanese lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Japanese

submitted.title: Daijoubu Little Star
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Little star, daijoubu

[Verse 1]
A quiet desk, a sleepy moon
Kimi no pace de, start it soon
No need to carry all the sky
Just keep one small light nearby

[Hook]
Daijoubu, little star
You are closer than you are
Daijoubu, softly start
One more line can be a heart

[Verse 2]
Mado no ame, gentle sound
Lost ideas can still be found
If the night is feeling far
Follow the pencil like a star

[Bridge]
Yukkuri, breathe again
No need to know the end
Yukkuri, stay with me
Let the page be free

[Final Hook]
Daijoubu, little star
You are closer than you are
Daijoubu, softly start
One more line can be a heart

[Outro]
Little star, daijoubu

title: Despacio Glow
tags: soft r&b, Latin lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Spanish

submitted.title: Despacio Glow
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Despacio glow

[Verse 1]
Keep the rhythm under the rain
Una línea, then breathe again
The page is not a battlefield
It is a place where thoughts can heal

[Hook]
Despacio, glow, glow
Little steps know where to go
Despacio, slow, slow
Stay with me and let it flow

[Verse 2]
La taza fría, la luz azul
No pasa nada, we move through
If the answer hides away
We can find another phrase

[Bridge]
No rush, no rush
Baja la voz
No rush, no rush
We still have a choice

[Final Hook]
Despacio, glow, glow
Little steps know where to go
Despacio, slow, slow
Stay with me and let it flow

[Outro]
Despacio glow

title: Slow Blanket
tags: soft folk, felt piano, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Slow Blanket
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Lay the day down

[Verse 1]
You do not have to finish now
The room can hold the open page
Let the tired minutes bow
Let the quiet rearrange

[Hook]
Slow blanket, cover the noise
Soft landing, small voice
Slow blanket, nothing to prove
Rest a little, then move

[Verse 2]
The pencil waits beside the tea
The window keeps a silver rain
Not every thought must turn the key
Not every pause becomes a chain

[Bridge]
Close the list
Open your hand
Leave the weight
Where it can stand

[Final Hook]
Slow blanket, cover the noise
Soft landing, small voice
Slow blanket, nothing to prove
Rest a little, then move

[Outro]
Lay the day down

title: Quiet Proof
tags: minimal pop, soft piano, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Quiet Proof
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Quiet proof

[Verse 1]
A page can grow without a sound
A thought can turn itself around
No need to make the moment bright
The small proof gathers in the night

[Hook]
Quiet proof, line by line
Little truth, taking time
Quiet proof, stay with me
Soft work becomes memory

[Verse 2]
The desk is warm, the world is low
The better answer moves in slow
If you forget the reason why
Look at the lamp and let it try

[Bridge]
Nothing loud
Nothing grand
Just the page
And your hand

[Final Hook]
Quiet proof, line by line
Little truth, taking time
Quiet proof, stay with me
Soft work becomes memory

[Outro]
Quiet proof

submitted.title: 慢慢落地
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
慢慢落地

[主歌一]
把今天先放在桌边
让没做完的事安静一点
你不需要马上改变
先把呼吸还给时间

[副歌]
慢慢落地

title: 静かな帰り道
tags: Japanese soft folk, ambient piano, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese

submitted.title: 静かな帰り道
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
静かな帰り道

[Verse 1]
今日の荷物を そっと置いて
小さな息を ひとつ数える
全部できなくても いいよ
夜は君を 責めたりしない

[Hook]
静かな帰り道
ゆっくり歩こう
静かな帰り道
明かりはまだある

[Verse 2]
窓に映った 疲れた顔も
少し笑えば 戻ってくる
忘れた夢は ポケットの中
明日の朝に また会える

[Bridge]
目を閉じて
雨を聞いて
何もしない
時間をあげよう

[Final Hook]
静かな帰り道
ゆっくり歩こう
静かな帰り道
明かりはまだある

[Outro]
静かな帰り道

title: Descansa Aquí
tags: Spanish soft folk, ambient pop, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Spanish

submitted.title: Descansa Aquí
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Descansa aquí

[Verse 1]
Deja el día sobre la mesa
No hace falta resolver
La noche tiene voz pequeña
Y te invita a volver

[Hook]
Descansa aquí, sin correr
Todo puede esperar
Descansa aquí, otra vez
Mañana va a llegar

[Verse 2]
La lluvia guarda tus papeles
La lámpara sabe escuchar
Si el cansancio te sostiene
Yo te ayudo a respirar

[Bridge]
Cierra los ojos
Suelta el final
Lo que no pesa
Puede sanar

[Final Hook]
Descansa aquí, sin correr
Todo puede esperar
Descansa aquí, otra vez
Mañana va a llegar

[Outro]
Descansa aquí

title: Small Fire
tags: clean boost pop, bright rock, controlled vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Small Fire
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Small fire, clean wire

[Verse 1]
Wake the screen, clear the floor
We have been slow, now we need one more
Not a storm, not a fight
Just a spark with a steady light

[Hook]
Small fire, get it done
One clean push, then we run
Small fire, bright and clear
Finish line is almost here

[Verse 2]
Stack the tasks, name the first
Tiny engine, useful burst
No big noise, no heavy crown
Just enough to move it down

[Bridge]
Count it in
Two, three, go
Keep it sharp
Keep it low

[Final Hook]
Small fire, get it done
One clean push, then we run
Small fire, bright and clear
Finish line is almost here

[Outro]
Small fire, clean wire

title: Vamos Go
tags: bright boost pop, clean breakbeat, light vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Spanish

submitted.title: Vamos Go
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Vamos, go

[Verse 1]
Clear the desk, open the door
Tenemos ritmo, one task more
No heavy drama, no big show
Just enough fire, vamos go

[Hook]
Vamos, go, go
Little engine, steady flow
Vamos, go, go
Finish clean and let it glow

[Verse 2]
Click by click, we make a road
Una cosa, then unload
If it feels too loud, turn it low
Still we move, vamos go

[Bridge]
Respira
Now begin
Small spark
Useful win

[Final Hook]
Vamos, go, go
Little engine, steady flow
Vamos, go, go
Finish clean and let it glow

[Outro]
Vamos, go

title: Piccola Luce
tags: Italian soft pop, lofi bossa, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Italian

submitted.title: Piccola Luce
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

[Verse 1]
La sera posa piano qui
Sul foglio bianco davanti a te
Non devi correre così
Un passo piccolo va bene

[Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Verse 2]
La tazza guarda la finestra
La pioggia scrive per metà
Se manca ancora una risposta
La calma la ritroverà

[Bridge]
Respira adesso
Lascia il peso
Torna leggero
Al tuo pensiero

[Final Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Outro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

title: Hallo Soft Signal
tags: soft global pop, warm synth, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + German

submitted.title: Hallo Soft Signal
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Hallo, soft signal

[Verse 1]
The desk light hums, der Abend ist klein
One little task, one quiet line
No need to carry the whole wide sky
Wir bleiben hier, you and I

[Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Verse 2]
The window holds a silver rain
Ein neuer Satz kommt irgendwann
If the thought needs time to appear
We keep the channel clear

[Bridge]
Langsam atmen
Let it be
Kleine Schritte
Stay with me

[Final Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Outro]
Hallo, soft signal

title: Stay a Little
tags: whisper pop, lofi r&b, soft vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Stay a Little
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

[Verse 1]
Stay a little, turn the page
There is no race inside this room
Let the quiet set the pace
Let the lamp become the moon

[Hook]
I am here, keep going
Soft and slow, keep going
One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Verse 2]
Tabs are open, tea is warm
Rain is tapping out the time
If the thought comes out half formed
We can shape it line by line

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
Nothing has to shine too loud
Breathe in, breathe out
Little steps are still allowed

[Final Hook]
I am here, keep going
Soft and slow, keep going
One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Outro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

title: Same Room
tags: roommate r&b, neo soul, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English

submitted.title: Same Room
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Same room, quiet radio

[Verse 1]
No rush, we can take it slow
Same room, quiet radio
Coffee steam and a steady glow
One more line and then we know

[Hook]
No rush tonight
We keep the little light
No rush tonight
You write, I stay nearby

[Verse 2]
Half the plan is on the floor
Half is knocking at the door
We can leave the heavy part
For tomorrow's stronger heart

[Bridge]
If the minute slips away
Let it go, let it go
We can find another way
Soft and low, soft and low

[Final Hook]
No rush tonight
We keep the little light
No rush tonight
You write, I stay nearby

[Outro]
Same room, quiet radio

title: 小灯还亮着
tags: 中文轻唱, lofi pop, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese

submitted.title: 小灯还亮着
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
小灯还亮着
别急着关掉

[主歌一]
桌上的纸还没有写完
杯里的茶慢慢变淡
今天不用变得多勇敢
先把这一页轻轻看完

[副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[主歌二]
窗外的雨把夜色放软
光标停在安静一端
如果思路忽然走散
就让它绕个弯再回来

[桥段]
深呼吸一下
别责怪停顿
慢一点也好
还在往前就很好

[最终副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[尾声]
小灯还亮着
你也还在

submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]

就一点点

[主歌一]
别急着把答案找全
有些路要绕过房间
键盘声轻轻落在耳边
像一场不吵的雨天

哪怕只是把标题改好一点

小小进度也值得被看见

submitted.title: 夜里有电台
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]

轻轻响起来

[主歌一]

屏幕亮得很乖

title: もう少しだけ
tags: Japanese bedroom pop, soft r&b, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese

submitted.title: もう少しだけ
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
もう少しだけ

[Verse 1]
机の上に 夜が来て
カップの影が 揺れている
答えはまだ 遠くても
今日の君は ここにいる

[Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Verse 2]
消した言葉も 道になる
ため息さえも リズムになる
眠い星が まばたきして
次の一歩を 教えてる

[Bridge]
止まってもいい
戻ってもいい
静かな声で
また始めよう

[Final Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Outro]
もう少しだけ

title: 작은 불빛
tags: Korean soft r&b, lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 작은 불빛
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
작은 불빛 옆에
천천히 앉아

[Verse 1]
책상 위에 밤이 내려와
조용한 숨처럼 머물러
급하지 않아도 괜찮아
한 줄씩 마음을 열어봐

[Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Verse 2]
커피 향이 살짝 식어도
생각은 다시 따뜻해져
흐린 문장도 길이 되고
손끝에 리듬이 돌아와

[Bridge]
숨을 쉬어
어깨를 내려놔
작은 밤이
너를 안아줄 거야

[Final Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Outro]
작은 불빛 옆에

title: 한 줄 더
tags: Korean bedroom pop, soft beat, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 한 줄 더
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
한 줄 더

[Verse 1]
창문 밖은 조용해지고
화면 속엔 작은 별 하나
완벽하지 않아도 좋아
지금은 시작이면 돼

[Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Verse 2]
지워진 말도 남아 있어
다른 길을 알려주니까
손끝에서 빛이 나면
오늘도 조금 가까워져

[Bridge]
쉬어도 돼
다시 와도 돼
여기 음악은
계속 기다려

[Final Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Outro]
한 줄 더

완벽하지 않아도 좋아
지금은 시작이면 돼

[Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Verse 2]
지워진 말도 남아 있어
다른 길을 알려주니까
손끝에서 빛이 나면
오늘도 조금 가까워져

[Bridge]
쉬어도 돼
다시 와도 돼
여기 음악은
계속 기다려

[Final Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Outro]
한 줄 더

title: Petite Lumière
tags: French soft pop, lofi chanson, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French

submitted.title: Petite Lumière
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Petite lumière
Reste près de moi

[Verse 1]
La page attend sans faire de bruit
Le soir s'installe au bord du thé
Tu n'as pas besoin d'aller vite
Un mot suffit pour commencer

[Hook]
Doucement, je reste là
Petite lumière, guide nos pas
Doucement, on continuera
Même si la phrase hésite parfois

[Verse 2]
La pluie dessine sur la vitre
Un vieux refrain très familier
Si ton idée devient timide
Laisse-la revenir respirer

[Bridge]
Ferme les yeux
Le monde peut attendre
Rouvre les mains
Le calme va descendre

[Final Hook]
Doucement, je reste là
Petite lumière, guide nos pas
Doucement, on continuera
Même si la phrase hésite parfois

[Outro]
Petite lumière
Reste près de moi

title: Encore Une Ligne
tags: French bedroom pop, soft groove, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French

submitted.title: Encore Une Ligne
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Encore une ligne

[Verse 1]
Le clavier chante doucement
La ville dort à moitié seulement
On garde un peu de courage
Dans le coin clair de la page

[Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Verse 2]
Même les idées sans couleur
Peuvent revenir avec douceur
Si la route tourne un peu
On suivra le fil lumineux

[Bridge]
Laisse le doute
Sur la table
Reviens léger
Reviens capable

[Final Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Outro]
Encore une ligne

title: Room Radio
tags: soft global pop, lofi r&b, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, English + Chinese

submitted.title: Room Radio
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Room radio
小小电台

[Verse 1]
Keep the light low, keep the page near
No need to hurry, I am right here
窗外的风慢慢吹来
把乱掉的心轻轻打开

[Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Verse 2]
The tiny clock is not a judge
A quiet start can be enough
桌上的梦还没醒来
我们就先陪它等待

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
别急着回答
Breathe in, breathe out
小光也会长大

[Final Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Outro]
Room radio
小小电台

title: Daijoubu Little Star
tags: soft pop, Japanese lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Japanese

submitted.title: Daijoubu Little Star
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Little star, daijoubu

[Verse 1]
A quiet desk, a sleepy moon
Kimi no pace de, start it soon
No need to carry all the sky
Just keep one small light nearby

[Hook]
Daijoubu, little star
You are closer than you are
Daijoubu, softly start
One more line can be a heart

[Verse 2]
Mado no ame, gentle sound
Lost ideas can still be found
If the night is feeling far
Follow the pencil like a star

[Bridge]
Yukkuri, breathe again
No need to know the end
Yukkuri, stay with me
Let the page be free

[Final Hook]
Daijoubu, little star
You are closer than you are
Daijoubu, softly start
One more line can be a heart

[Outro]
Little star, daijoubu

title: Despacio Glow
tags: soft r&b, Latin lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Spanish

submitted.title: Despacio Glow
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Despacio glow

[Verse 1]
Keep the rhythm under the rain
Una línea, then breathe again
The page is not a battlefield
It is a place where thoughts can heal

[Hook]
Despacio, glow, glow
Little steps know where to go
Despacio, slow, slow
Stay with me and let it flow

[Verse 2]
La taza fría, la luz azul
No pasa nada, we move through
If the answer hides away
We can find another phrase

[Bridge]
No rush, no rush
Baja la voz
No rush, no rush
We still have a choice

[Final Hook]
Despacio, glow, glow
Little steps know where to go
Despacio, slow, slow
Stay with me and let it flow

[Outro]
Despacio glow

title: Vamos Go
tags: bright boost pop, clean breakbeat, light vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Spanish

submitted.title: Vamos Go
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Vamos, go

[Verse 1]
Clear the desk, open the door
Tenemos ritmo, one task more
No heavy drama, no big show
Just enough fire, vamos go

[Hook]
Vamos, go, go
Little engine, steady flow
Vamos, go, go
Finish clean and let it glow

[Verse 2]
Click by click, we make a road
Una cosa, then unload
If it feels too loud, turn it low
Still we move, vamos go

[Bridge]
Respira
Now begin
Small spark
Useful win

[Final Hook]
Vamos, go, go
Little engine, steady flow
Vamos, go, go
Finish clean and let it glow

[Outro]
Vamos, go

title: Piccola Luce
tags: Italian soft pop, lofi bossa, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Italian

submitted.title: Piccola Luce
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

[Verse 1]
La sera posa piano qui
Sul foglio bianco davanti a te
Non devi correre così
Un passo piccolo va bene

[Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Verse 2]
La tazza guarda la finestra
La pioggia scrive per metà
Se manca ancora una risposta
La calma la ritroverà

[Bridge]
Respira adesso
Lascia il peso
Torna leggero
Al tuo pensiero

[Final Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Outro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

title: Hallo Soft Signal
tags: soft global pop, warm synth, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + German

submitted.title: Hallo Soft Signal
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Hallo, soft signal

[Verse 1]
The desk light hums, der Abend ist klein
One little task, one quiet line
No need to carry the whole wide sky
Wir bleiben hier, you and I

[Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Verse 2]
The window holds a silver rain
Ein neuer Satz kommt irgendwann
If the thought needs time to appear
We keep the channel clear

[Bridge]
Langsam atmen
Let it be
Kleine Schritte
Stay with me

[Final Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Outro]
Hallo, soft signal

title: 小灯还亮着
tags: 中文轻唱, lofi pop, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese

submitted.title: 小灯还亮着
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
小灯还亮着
别急着关掉

[主歌一]
桌上的纸还没有写完
杯里的茶慢慢变淡
今天不用变得多勇敢
先把这一页轻轻看完

[副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[主歌二]
窗外的雨把夜色放软
光标停在安静一端
如果思路忽然走散
就让它绕个弯再回来

[桥段]
深呼吸一下
别责怪停顿
慢一点也好
还在往前就很好

[最终副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[尾声]
小灯还亮着
你也还在

submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
再写一点点
就一点点

有些路要绕过房间
键盘声轻轻落在耳边

submitted.title: 夜里有电台
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
夜里有电台
轻轻响起来

[主歌一]
城市睡得很慢
屏幕亮得很乖
你把今天摊开
像一张小小海

[副歌]
夜里有电台
陪你把心放下来
不要追太快
慢慢也会到未来

有些梦还没来
没关系别责怪

别怕呀
你不是一个人在抵达

夜里有电台
陪你把心放下来
不要追太快
慢慢也会到未来

title: もう少しだけ
tags: Japanese bedroom pop, soft r&b, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese

submitted.title: もう少しだけ
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
もう少しだけ

[Verse 1]
机の上に 夜が来て
カップの影が 揺れている
答えはまだ 遠くても
今日の君は ここにいる

[Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Verse 2]
消した言葉も 道になる
ため息さえも リズムになる
眠い星が まばたきして
次の一歩を 教えてる

[Bridge]
止まってもいい
戻ってもいい
静かな声で
また始めよう

[Final Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Outro]
もう少しだけ

title: 작은 불빛
tags: Korean soft r&b, lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 작은 불빛
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
작은 불빛 옆에
천천히 앉아

[Verse 1]
책상 위에 밤이 내려와
조용한 숨처럼 머물러
급하지 않아도 괜찮아
한 줄씩 마음을 열어봐

[Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Verse 2]
커피 향이 살짝 식어도
생각은 다시 따뜻해져
흐린 문장도 길이 되고
손끝에 리듬이 돌아와

[Bridge]
숨을 쉬어
어깨를 내려놔
작은 밤이
너를 안아줄 거야

[Final Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Outro]
작은 불빛 옆에

title: 한 줄 더
tags: Korean bedroom pop, soft beat, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 한 줄 더
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
한 줄 더

[Verse 1]
창문 밖은 조용해지고
화면 속엔 작은 별 하나
완벽하지 않아도 좋아
지금은 시작이면 돼

[Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Verse 2]
지워진 말도 남아 있어
다른 길을 알려주니까
손끝에서 빛이 나면
오늘도 조금 가까워져

[Bridge]
쉬어도 돼
다시 와도 돼
여기 음악은
계속 기다려

[Final Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Outro]

title: Encore Une Ligne
tags: French bedroom pop, soft groove, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French

submitted.title: Encore Une Ligne
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Encore une ligne

[Verse 1]
Le clavier chante doucement
La ville dort à moitié seulement
On garde un peu de courage
Dans le coin clair de la page

[Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Verse 2]
Même les idées sans couleur
Peuvent revenir avec douceur
Si la route tourne un peu
On suivra le fil lumineux

[Bridge]
Laisse le doute
Sur la table
Reviens léger
Reviens capable

[Final Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Outro]
Encore une ligne

title: Room Radio
tags: soft global pop, lofi r&b, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, English + Chinese

submitted.title: Room Radio
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Room radio
小小电台

[Verse 1]
Keep the light low, keep the page near
No need to hurry, I am right here
窗外的风慢慢吹来
把乱掉的心轻轻打开

[Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Verse 2]
The tiny clock is not a judge
A quiet start can be enough
桌上的梦还没醒来
我们就先陪它等待

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
别急着回答
Breathe in, breathe out
小光也会长大

[Final Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Outro]
Room radio
小小电台

title: Daijoubu Little Star
tags: soft pop, Japanese lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Japanese

submitted.title: Daijoubu Little Star
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Little star, daijoubu

[Verse 1]
A quiet desk, a sleepy moon
Kimi no pace de, start it soon
No need to carry all the sky
Just keep one small light nearby

[Hook]
Daijoubu, little star
You are closer than you are
Daijoubu, softly start
One more line can be a heart

[Verse 2]
Mado no ame, gentle sound
Lost ideas can still be found
If the night is feeling far
Follow the pencil like a star

[Bridge]
Yukkuri, breathe again
No need to know the end
Yukkuri, stay with me
Let the page be free

[Final Hook]
Daijoubu, little star
You are closer than you are
Daijoubu, softly start
One more line can be a heart

[Outro]
Little star, daijoubu

title: Vamos Go
tags: bright boost pop, clean breakbeat, light vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Spanish

submitted.title: Vamos Go
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Vamos, go

[Verse 1]
Clear the desk, open the door
Tenemos ritmo, one task more
No heavy drama, no big show
Just enough fire, vamos go

[Hook]
Vamos, go, go
Little engine, steady flow
Vamos, go, go
Finish clean and let it glow

[Verse 2]
Click by click, we make a road
Una cosa, then unload
If it feels too loud, turn it low
Still we move, vamos go

[Bridge]
Respira
Now begin
Small spark
Useful win

[Final Hook]
Vamos, go, go
Little engine, steady flow
Vamos, go, go
Finish clean and let it glow

[Outro]
Vamos, go

title: Piccola Luce
tags: Italian soft pop, lofi bossa, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Italian

submitted.title: Piccola Luce
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

[Verse 1]
La sera posa piano qui
Sul foglio bianco davanti a te
Non devi correre così
Un passo piccolo va bene

[Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Verse 2]
La tazza guarda la finestra
La pioggia scrive per metà
Se manca ancora una risposta
La calma la ritroverà

[Bridge]
Respira adesso
Lascia il peso
Torna leggero
Al tuo pensiero

[Final Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Outro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

title: Hallo Soft Signal
tags: soft global pop, warm synth, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + German

submitted.title: Hallo Soft Signal
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Hallo, soft signal

[Verse 1]
The desk light hums, der Abend ist klein
One little task, one quiet line
No need to carry the whole wide sky
Wir bleiben hier, you and I

[Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Verse 2]
The window holds a silver rain
Ein neuer Satz kommt irgendwann
If the thought needs time to appear
We keep the channel clear

[Bridge]
Langsam atmen
Let it be
Kleine Schritte
Stay with me

[Final Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Outro]
Hallo, soft signal

title: 小灯还亮着
tags: 中文轻唱, lofi pop, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese

submitted.title: 小灯还亮着
submitted.lyrics:
[前奏]
小灯还亮着
别急着关掉

[主歌一]
桌上的纸还没有写完
杯里的茶慢慢变淡
今天不用变得多勇敢
先把这一页轻轻看完

[副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[主歌二]
窗外的雨把夜色放软
光标停在安静一端
如果思路忽然走散
就让它绕个弯再回来

[桥段]
深呼吸一下
别责怪停顿
慢一点也好
还在往前就很好

[最终副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

小灯还亮着
你也还在

小灯还亮着

杯里的茶慢慢变淡

你也还在

我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开
小灯还亮着
你也还在

[Instrumental Bridge]

[Final Chorus]

我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开
小灯还亮着
你也还在

[Outro]

小灯还亮着
你也还在

submitted.title: もう少しだけ
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]

今日の君は ここにいる

[Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう
もう少しだけ そばにいるよ
ゆっくりでいいよ

[Verse 2]
消した言葉も 道になる
ため息さえも リズムになる
眠い星が まばたきして
次の一歩を 教えてる

[Bridge]
止まってもいい
戻ってもいい
静かな声で
また始めよう

[Final Hook]
もう少しだけ 書いてみよう
小さな光を 追いかけよう

ゆっくりでいいよ

title: 작은 불빛
tags: Korean soft r&b, lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean

submitted.title: 작은 불빛
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
작은 불빛 옆에
천천히 앉아

[Verse 1]
책상 위에 밤이 내려와
조용한 숨처럼 머물러
급하지 않아도 괜찮아
한 줄씩 마음을 열어봐

[Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Verse 2]
커피 향이 살짝 식어도
생각은 다시 따뜻해져
흐린 문장도 길이 되고
손끝에 리듬이 돌아와

[Bridge]
숨을 쉬어
어깨를 내려놔
작은 밤이
너를 안아줄 거야

[Final Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Outro]

submitted.title: 한 줄 더
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
한 줄 더

[Verse 1]
창문 밖은 조용해지고
화면 속엔 작은 별 하나
완벽하지 않아도 좋아
지금은 시작이면 돼

[Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까

지워진 말도 남아 있어

오늘도 조금 가까워져

[Bridge]
쉬어도 돼
다시 와도 돼

submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Encore une ligne

[Verse 1]
Le clavier chante doucement

submitted.title: Room Radio

[Intro]
Room radio
小小电台

Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be

你写一句, I stay here

The tiny clock is not a judge
A quiet start can be enough
桌上的梦还没醒来

别急着回答

submitted.title: Piccola Luce
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

[Verse 1]
La sera posa piano qui
Sul foglio bianco davanti a te
Non devi correre così
Un passo piccolo va bene

[Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

La tazza guarda la finestra
La pioggia scrive per metà
Se manca ancora una risposta
La calma la ritroverà

[Bridge]
Respira adesso
Lascia il peso
Torna leggero
Al tuo pensiero

submitted.title: Hallo Soft Signal
submitted.lyrics:
[Intro]
Hallo, soft signal

[Verse 1]
The desk light hums, der Abend ist klein
One little task, one quiet line
No need to carry the whole wide sky
Wir bleiben hier, you and I

[Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Verse 2]
The window holds a silver rain
Ein neuer Satz kommt irgendwann
If the thought needs time to appear

[Bridge]
Langsam atmen
Let it be
Kleine Schritte
Stay with me

[Final Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
